evidence_ref: GitHub Actions CI run 29598629529 (agileteam/bazodiac-zwds-atlas): conclusion=success. Full pipeline green on ubuntu-latest: tsc+eslint+architecture-gates+vitest(node+component)+build+playwright(chromium+webkit, both projects, incl. axe)+npm audit --audit-level=high. A real CI run, not just local.

tests/integration/amd001-unknown-evidence.test.mjs: real assembled BFF (createApp) via supertest hard-refuses unresolved/BLOCKED/MISMATCH evidence with 502 EVIDENCE_UNRESOLVED, no partial report/token; 4/4 green; mutation-checked by independent review. Fixture data only.

DEPLOYED (zwds-chart-production.up.railway.app) live geocode against REAL FuFirE POST /v1/geocode {place}: Shanghai->5 candidates each with derived IANA tz, Berlin->1 (Europe/Berlin, conf 0.997). Full deployed live flow geocode->calculate verified: /api/zwds/calculate SUCCESS, crosscheck MATCHED, 12 palaces, fresh requestId req_zwds_d650f3d9. config-status geocodeConfigured:true, dataMode:live. Deploy-verify also caught + fixed a misconfig: VITE_DATA_MODE was fixture (app served DEMO not live) + VITE_BFF_BASE_URL wrong -> set bff + /api + FUFIRE_GEOCODE_PATH.

LIVE end-to-end on the DEPLOYED prod URL (zwds-chart-production.up.railway.app, FUFIRE_MODE=live, x-api-key): POST /api/zwds/calculate -> 200 SUCCESS/MATCHED, 12 palaces, 29 sections, FRESH requestId+generatedAt per call (real FuFirE, not fixture). Deploy-verify also caught+fixed a metadata-contract divergence (release_status/human_review_required) invisible to local/CI.

Normalizer graph invariants hold on the REAL FuFirE response: amd003-pin PASS (assertInvariants + normalizeRaw on the live response); tests/reality/fufire-pin.test.mjs asserts parse+invariants+normalize on the pinned real response. 12 palaces, referential integrity, 4 distinct transformations incl. real HUA_QUAN.

tests/integration/pdf-token-expiry.test.mjs + tests/unit/reportStore.test.mjs: expired/unknown PDF token -> 404 (reachable without Chromium after the report-pdf reorder); reportStore expiry-eviction + prune reclaim (mutation-verified) + 192-bit token entropy. Real assembled BFF, fixture data.

tests/component/MainReportVisibility.test.tsx: real AppProvider+reducer renders source status/ruleset/crosscheck/fingerprint/schoolProfileStatus/scriptPolicy/provenance/unresolved-conventions on the MAIN report (Evidence page NOT mounted); mutation-verified 3 ways. DEMO_REPORT fixture data.

tests/component/DecadeTimeline.test.tsx: selecting a decade keeps report.palaces+stars byte-identical (natal not overwritten; mutation-verified) while highlighting the palace; age-reckoning id surfaced from the real model (east_asian_nominal.guide-v1, flows in both fixture + bff). DEMO_REPORT fixture data.

tests/e2e/a11y-touch-targets.spec.ts: real Playwright boundingBox() in desktop + mobile(360px) chromium/webkit — every visible interactive control >=44x44 CSS px (was 33x22 / 36px before). Full e2e suite 10/10 green both projects incl. axe-on-landing. 200%-zoom + full-atlas-view a11y still pending T08.

tests/e2e/atlas-a11y.spec.ts (real chromium/webkit): palace selection is keyboard-operable (Tab+Enter, aria-pressed, no focus loss) and the aria-live region announces the selection PLUS its harmony/opposition relations (REQ-008 gap fixed in AppShell). Full e2e 16/16.

scripts/architecture-gates.mjs (real static audit of 26 src files: no browser ZWDS calc / server import / FuFirE endpoint) + tests/e2e/core-flow.spec.ts (real-browser: zero FuFirE/LLM upstream requests) + hedged no-deterministic-claims copy + AMD-002 not-authoritative notice (report+PDF, mutation-verified).

tests/e2e/core-flow.spec.ts: guided 5-step intake driven end-to-end in real chromium+webkit (date/time/direction/consent/calculate). Pure-client UI, no external boundary. Gap: no dedicated validate/block unit test for AC-001 field-level errors.

scripts/architecture-gates.mjs static-audits the real src bundle (no server import/secret/FuFirE endpoint) + tests/e2e/core-flow.spec.ts asserts the real browser issues ZERO FuFirE/LLM upstream requests across the flow. Browser->BFF-only isolation on the real bundle.

tests/unit/goldenFixture.test.mjs: buildEvidenceIndex covers ruleset/time/calendar/anchors/palaces/stars/transformations/relations/decades/quality/provenance; every section references only existing evidence ids + a truth class; unknown evidence hard-fails (amd001). Fixture data.
tests/unit/palaceGrid.test.ts (12 unique perimeter palaces, empty 2x2 centre) + tests/e2e/{atlas-a11y,responsive}.spec.ts render the real 4x4 grid in chromium/webkit. Exactly-12 + readable core.

tests/unit/catalog.test.ts: versioned catalog, canonical ids, tone-marked pinyin every entry, no kana/hangul, CATALOG_SHA256=null (no fabricated reviewed digest). Glyph/policy-verified only; content authority SOURCE_NEEDED, AMD-002-gated. Pure client.

tests/integration/bff.test.mjs (llmUsed:false) + tests/integration/amd001-*.test.mjs (deterministic sections present) + core-flow e2e completes report with LLM off. Deterministic report complete without an LLM. PDF path is slice-2 per AMD-004.

tests/integration/bff.test.mjs: arbitrary profile -> 409 FIXTURE_PROFILE_MISMATCH, no report; tests/e2e/core-flow.spec.ts + reportSmoke assert DEMO_FIXTURE label visible. Real assembled BFF, fixture data.

DEPLOYED server PDF on zwds-chart-production.up.railway.app: live calculate -> reportToken -> POST /api/report-pdf (de-DE) returned HTTP 200, content-type application/pdf, 158614-byte %PDF- document. pdftotext extracted German palace labels (Lebenspalast/Wirkungspalast), CJK glyphs 官祿宮/太陽 (fonts-noto-cjk renders, no tofu), the AMD-002 not-authoritative notice (nicht maßgeblich), the ten-year windows and the chart fingerprint. Runtime provisioned via a pinned Dockerfile (node:22-slim + apt chromium + fonts-noto-cjk) after Nixpacks aptPkgs failed to install chromium; PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH trailing-space bug fixed (zod .trim()). Local real-runtime smoke + token-expiry + HTML-structure tests all green.

Fail-closed LLM synthesis pipeline built (server/llm/{corpus,client,synthesize,validate,interpret}.mjs) per the user Scope-Shift decision (build the fail-closed pipeline; user-facing LLM interpretation stays NOT DONE until a reviewed corpus exists). Ships DISABLED: envSchema+superRefine refuse boot with LLM_ENABLED unless LLM_CORPUS_STATUS=SOURCE_REVIEWED + corpus path + sha256 pin + api key; loadReviewedCorpus additionally hash-pins the bytes (mismatch => refuse boot). Grounding guard (validateSynthesis) rejects any citation to a rule not supplied for the section, any evidence id not belonging to the section, uncited/empty/duplicate/malformed output, non-JSON, and — numeric containment — any number/year/percentage/amount absent from the reviewed guidance; ANY rejection discards the whole synthesis and falls back to the deterministic sections (no partial mix). Tested with real modules + fixture reviewed corpus + a MOCKED LLM client (tests/integration/llm-pipeline.test.mjs, 14 cases). Adversarial workflow (6 vectors x attack+verify) found 0 fail-closed violations. NOT production-verified (LLM off in prod, no reviewed corpus) and NOT a real LLM-boundary smoke (client mocked).
